name: MicrobotsLogAnalyzer
description: Run Microbots LogAnalysisBot against a log file using Azure OpenAI. Authenticates via the supplied Azure Resource Manager service connection.
author: Microbots contributors

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Service connection used to obtain a token for Azure OpenAI.

inputs.name: deploymentName
inputs.label: Deployment name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure OpenAI deployment name used by Microbots.

inputs.name: endpoint
inputs.label: Azure OpenAI endpoint
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure OpenAI resource endpoint, for example https://my-resource.openai.azure.com/.

inputs.name: apiVersion
inputs.label: API version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure OpenAI API version, for example 2025-03-01-preview.

inputs.name: codebasePath
inputs.label: Codebase path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the repository or source folder Microbots can inspect while analyzing the log.

inputs.name: logFilePath
inputs.label: Log file path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the log file. (Both Absolute Path and Relative to Codebase Path are supported.)

inputs.name: outputFilePath
inputs.label: Analysis output file path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional absolute path to a .txt, .md, or .log file where the LLM analysis result will be written. The file does not need to exist; the task creates missing directories and replaces any existing file contents.

inputs.name: additionalContext
inputs.label: Additional analysis context
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional extra context appended to the log analysis user prompt. It does not replace or override the Microbots system prompt. Maximum length: 1024 characters.

inputs.name: maxIterations
inputs.label: Maximum iterations
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional maximum number of Microbots iterations.
